holdings.infoBox: TSME is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bel Fuse stock at 3.48%, Modine Manufacturing Company at 3.47%, Limbach Holdings at 2.97%, Celestica at 2.76%, and Element Solutions at 2.75%.

overview.description: The Thrivent Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (TSME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed, non-transparent ETF that invests in stocks of global mid- and small-cap companies screened for long-term growth. The fund utilizes the Natixis/NYSE non-transparent model. TSME was launched on Oct 5, 2022 and is issued by Thrivent.
